name: Air / Solo Frosted Glass Reducer (19-14)
summary: Transform your 19mm female downstem to seamlessly connect with 14mm male glass-on-glass fittings.
description: Transform your 19mm female downstem to seamlessly connect with 14mm male glass-on-glass fittings. It is specifically designed for use with Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser, ensuring compatibility and a smooth connection. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
